case_title: VITAL EVENTS, LLC. VS. SENSORIA, LLC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SENSORIA, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,920.00 FILED BY VITAL EVENTS, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT SENSORIA, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VITAL EVENTS, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT SENSORIA, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DECEMBER 21, 2015. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. HEARING HELD, MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DECEMBER 21, 2015 BY JPT DAVID LAVINE, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-09-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SENSORIA, LLC.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF VITAL EVENTS, LLC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VITAL EVENTS, LLC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VITAL EVENTS, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SENSORIA, LLC. $1,920.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,985.00, BASED ON THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED, THE COURT DOES NOT FIND THAT AN ORAL CONTRACT WAS IN PLACE BETWEEN THE PARTIES TO PERMIT DEFENDANT TO OFFSET THE DISPUTED FUNDS, THESE FUNDS SHOULD BE REPAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT SENSORIA, LLC.
